hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tight text-ink
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-serif tracking-tight text-ink
hierarchy.shloka: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-serif tracking-normal text-moss leading-relaxed mb-6
hierarchy.small_label: text-xs md:text-sm font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-stone

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-12 md:px-12 md:py-24

textarea.style: w-full bg-white/60 border border-border rounded-lg p-6 text-lg font-sans resize-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-moss transition-all
textarea.placeholder: Describe your situation... (e.g. I am feeling anxious about my career)

button.primary: bg-moss text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-sans tracking-wide hover:bg-moss_hover transition-colors shadow-sm
button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-ink px-6 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-border/50 transition-colors

cards.shloka_card: bg-white border border-border/50 rounded-2xl p-8 md:p-12 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(44,42,40,0.04)]
cards.history_card: bg-transparent border-b border-border py-4 hover:bg-white/40 transition-colors cursor-pointer

audio_player.style: flex items-center gap-4 bg-subtle/50 rounded-full py-2 px-6 w-fit

chips.style: inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-border/60 text-sm font-sans text-stone hover:border-moss hover:text-moss transition-all cursor-pointer bg-white/30

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons translate-y-[-1px] and drop subtle shadow. Text links change text color to moss.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Fade in with subtle 10px translate-y on load using framer-motion.
motion_and_interaction.loading_state: A slow, breathing opacity pulse on the central 'Seeking Wisdom...' text.
motion_and_interaction.shloka_reveal: Staggered fade in: Sanskrit first, then Hindi, then English, then practical guidance.

icons.style: Minimal, thin stroke (1.5px), consistent sizing (w-5 h-5 for inline, w-8 h-8 for primary actions)

images.description: Calm minimal blue sea and sky, to be used with very low opacity (e.g., 5-10%) or as a subtle gradient texture behind the hero section.
Ancient manuscript texture, to be used as a blend-mode multiply overlay at 3% opacity on the shloka display card for a tactile feel.

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA. The moss brand color (#3A4B40) against #F9F7F3 has a contrast ratio of 8.5:1 (Passes AAA).
accessibility.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to all interactable elements: submit-situation-btn, situation-input, play-audio-btn, save-favorite-btn, history-item.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the specified font packages via npm/yarn.
Set up Tailwind config with the exact color hex codes and font families provided.
Build the UI focusing heavily on typographic alignment and white space.
Do NOT use typical dashboard or SaaS layouts. This should look like an interactive book or an editorial magazine.
For the Sanskrit verse, ensure Noto Serif Devanagari is explicitly applied so the characters render beautifully.
Implement the elevenlabs audio TTS in phase 2 by providing a clear but unobtrusive audio play button.
Use lucide-react for the play/pause, heart (favorites), and history icons.
Implement framer-motion for smooth staggered appearances of the text.
